# R packages required by wrf_rainfall_forecast.R
# One package per line. Lines starting with # are ignored.
# This file drives both the GHA cache key and the install step —
# bump the version comment if you add/remove a package so the
# cache is invalidated and packages are re-installed cleanly.
#
# Last updated: 2026-03

sf
dplyr

lubridate
